series_metadata.series_title: Drug Free Workplace Forms & Negative Testing Results
series_metadata.series_description: Consists of Federal & State Negative Drug/Alcohol Results, Chain of Custody Forms, & "No Test” (requested tests that could not be completed for reasons such as insufficient sample, damaged specimen during transport, Agency ordered incorrect test).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current year and one previous year ; Electronic: current year and one previous year
